name: libruby3.3
title: libruby3.3
description:
Libraries necessary to run Ruby 3.3
Ruby is the interpreted scripting language for quick and easy
object-oriented programming.  It has many features to process text
files and to do system management tasks (as in perl).  It is simple,
straight-forward, and extensible.
.
This package includes the 'libruby-3.3' library, necessary to run Ruby 3.3.
(API version 3.3.0)
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libruby3.3 because Libraries necessary to run Ruby 3.3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libruby3.3 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libruby3.3 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libruby3.3 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
